feedback.details: Diagram passes mmdc validation but contains duplicate element definition: `System_Ext(frontierAPI, ...)` defined at both line 17 (outside boundary) and line 19 (inside Public Internet boundary). While mmdc exits 0, this creates ambiguity in the rendered diagram. The line 17 definition should be removed.

All 8 required component categories present: (1) llm-switch System (line 23), (2) Developer (line 8) and Operations (line 9) persons, (3) Nomad (line 10), Consul (line 12), Vault (line 13), (4) Qwen 7B GGUF (line 15) and Nemotron-3-22B (line 16), (5) OpenAI gpt-4-turbo (lines 17/19), (6) Orchestrator Model (line 21) and Statistical Routing (line 22).

Word count is approximately 410 words (line 3), exceeding the required 300±10% range (270-330 words). Grammarly API score and NLTK passive voice analysis cannot be verified without external tool access. PRD Section 4.2 reference is present.

Markdown table present at lines 40-52 mapping all components to PRD sections (format: 'Section X.Y, Page Z'). Table includes 11 rows (more than the 8 mentioned in criteria), but all required components are mapped.

Most labels follow format and exceed 25 chars. However, line 34 `Rel_Back(vault, llmSwitch, "401 → Token Refresh", "<1s")` has label only 19 characters (below 25 char minimum). Lines 33-34 (Rel_Back fallbacks) don't follow the strict 'Protocol: <Source> performs <Action> on <Destination>' format.

All versions specified correctly: Golang 1.21+ and Docker 24.0+ (line 23), Nomad 1.7.0+ (line 10), Consul 1.16.0+ (line 12), Vault 1.15.0+ (line 13). Internal systems Orchestrator Model (line 21) and Statistical Routing (line 22) correctly use `System()` container.

Both required dashed fallback lines present: (a) line 33 `Rel_Back(llmSwitch, frontierAPI, "Failover on latency >100ms", "<2s")` and (b) line 34 `Rel_Back(vault, llmSwitch, "401 → Token Refresh", "<1s")`. Latency annotations present for all model paths (lines 29-33).

Dashed boundary at line 11 correctly encloses Consul (line 12) and Vault (line 13) as 'Trusted Zone (mTLS Required)'. Solid boundary at line 18 encloses Public Internet with 'TLS 1.3 Termination'. However, duplicate `frontierAPI` definition creates confusion about element placement.

Narrative references /metrics (line 3), Grafana dashboard 'llm-switch-overview' (line 3), and 'Kubernetes Node Affinity constraints' (line 3). However, narrative uses phrase 'prioritize memory utilization' rather than the required exact term 'memory-priority' from supplementary context Section 3.1.

overall_summary: The architecture document contains several critical defects requiring immediate remediation. Primary issues: (1) Word count of ~410 words exceeds the strict 300±10% limit (should be 270-330); (2) Duplicate definition of `frontierAPI` element at lines 17 and 19 creates diagram ambiguity; (3) Relationship label on line 34 ('401 → Token Refresh') is only 19 characters, violating the ≥25 character requirement; (4) Narrative uses 'prioritize memory utilization' instead of the exact term 'memory-priority'. Secondary issues include the PRD Traceability Matrix having 11 rows rather than the specified 8, and fallback relationship labels not following the strict 'Protocol: <Source>...' format. Technology versions, component completeness, and edge case handling are correct.
